blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-01-28.
11,757 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
219 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 6 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-01-29): ['176447', '1877', '261538', '35131', '55999', '85609']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-01-27 -> 2026-01-28)

- "Which South Sudan state will the UN say has more than 235,000 people displaced by 10 February 2026?" → Jonglei
- "Who will Benjamin Netanyahu say is set to visit Israel soon, by February 2026?" → Narendra Modi
- "Which West African country will have all political parties dissolved by the end of January 2026?" → Burkina Faso

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (111 resolved, 219 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
